---
title: "Automatic Differentiation and Differentiable Programming"
subtitle: "SCIML-004 | Track D — Scientific ML"
description: "Automatic differentiation is the computational engine powering modern scientific machine learning. This textbook covers the theory, implementation, and application of AD to scientific computing."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Automatic Differentiation and Differentiable Programming

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
